arts.ttl: Man Utd Rondo Training Footage Goes Viral Before Rangers Clash
arts.sum: Fans are not happy with the players' approach to the close-control rondo drill ahead of Thursday night's clash with Rangers.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund priced out of move for Marcus Rashford leaving unsettled Man United star with just one likely European destination this month
arts.sum: Dortmund is looking an increasingly unlikely destination for wantaway Manchester United forward Marcus Rashford this winter.

arts.ttl: Revealed: Harry Maguire sent Joshua Zirkzee a private message after striker was booed off after just 33 minutes in Newcastle defeat
arts.sum: Harry Maguire revealed that he sent a message of support to Joshua Zirkzee after Man United fans cheered when their summer signing was substituted in a 2-0 defeat by Newcastle last month.

arts.ttl: ‘They were asking’: What West Ham have asked Man Utd to for them regarding Marcus Rashford – journalist
arts.sum: There’s just over a week to go in the January transfer window, and Marcus Rashford’s future remains unresolved. Rashford is ready to leave Manchester United,...

arts.ttl: 'Annoying the manager most' - Harry Maguire identifies Manchester United's biggest problem
arts.sum: Harry Maguire has addressed the importance of Man United improving, particularly at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: How much Manchester United and Tottenham have already banked in 2024/25 UEFA Europa League prize money
Fabrizio Romano announces NEW Man Utd transfer bid
arts.sum: Man Utd had a €27 million bid for Dorgu knocked back by Lecce earlier this week and as head coach Ruben Amorim tries to address the long-standing issue the Red Devils face on the left side of his defence, another offer is set to be made for the Denmark international. Fabrizio Romano says that Manchester United are in the process of launching another transfer bid to secure the signing of Lecce star Patrick Dorgu .

arts.ttl: Diallo's rise from Rangers flop to Man Utd saviour
arts.sum: Tom English on Amad Diallo's ascent from an underwhelming loan spell at Rangers to be the shining light amid Manchester United's gloom.

arts.ttl: Ole Gunnar Solskjaer reveals Man Utd approach landed huge win in first game at new club
arts.sum: Ole Gunnar Solskjaer enjoyed a 4-1 win against Athletic Bilbao in his first game as Besiktas' new manager, with the ex-Manchester United boss making another instant impact

arts.ttl: 'Always convinced' - Rangers are already well aware of Manchester United 'dangerman'
arts.sum: Amad Diallo will come up against former side Rangers in the Europa League this evening
